text.title: AC Mapping Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns that hollow out AC-to-assertion mapping. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: assertion_class is filled in but asserted_behavior is a structural claim ("api was called", "no exception raised", "status 200 alone").
antipattern.root-cause: AI test generators favour high-coverage structural assertions because they always pass. Engineers copy them in without rewriting.
antipattern.fix: Reviewer rejects with a specific request: "add a behavior assertion that verifies the AC's effect (state, output, side-effect, or specific failure)". Engineer rewrites the test; reviewer re-walks the mapping.

antipattern.symptom: PR description has no mapping section, or the mapping is a placeholder ("see tests", "later"), evading the discipline.
antipattern.root-cause: CI does not block PR-ready transitions on a missing mapping; reviewers do not enforce.
antipattern.fix: extract-acs auto-populates the AC list at PR open. Pre-merge gate rejects PRs whose ac-mapping has empty or placeholder asserted_behavior fields.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer maps an AC to a test that does not actually verify that AC; the test exercises a different code path that happens to be in the same module.
antipattern.root-cause: Mapping is filled out without re-reading the AC text against the test body; copy-paste from another row.
antipattern.fix: Reject the PR with the specific mismatch. Engineer either writes a new test that actually verifies the AC and updates the mapping, or restates the AC if it was the AC text that was unclear.

antipattern.symptom: Refactor renamed test files or test names; mapping file still points to old paths; check-mapping script reports broken refs.
antipattern.root-cause: Mapping is treated as documentation, not as code that fails CI when stale.
antipattern.fix: Run check-mapping as a pre-merge gate. Engineer updates the mapping in the same PR. Long-term, introduce stable test_id annotations so renames do not break the mapping.

antipattern.symptom: Approval lands within a minute of PR-ready; reviewer-effectiveness metric (assertion-rejection rate) trends to zero.
antipattern.root-cause: Reviewers default to trusting CI green; the mapping is read as an annotation, not as a verifiable claim.
antipattern.fix: Track reviewer-effectiveness as a team metric. Re-train reviewers on the structural-vs-behavior distinction; pair reviewer with author for a week on a difficult PR to recalibrate.

antipattern.symptom: Story's AC list changes mid-PR; mapping is not updated; merged PR claims to cover ACs that the story no longer contains.
antipattern.root-cause: AC edits in the tracker do not notify the PR; engineer is unaware.
antipattern.fix: extract-acs re-runs at PR-ready and at pre-merge; any diff between story ACs and mapping ACs triggers a review request. Story changes mid-PR are merged into the mapping explicitly.
